title: thymus zygis var. sylvestris
intro: Thymus zygis var. sylvestris, also known as Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant, native to the Iberian Peninsula and characterized by its compact growth habit and fragrant foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils which exhibit antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thymus zygis var. sylvestris include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and promote overall well-being.
